name: WLF_ASSIGNMENT_TASKS_F
description: Table for course-class Assignment Reconciliation work.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier to represent a row.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PARENT_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Parent Task Id (in Hierarchical case).

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment Record Id (referential key from assignment records table).

columns.Name: TASK_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: Who is responsible to finish the task , mostly PERSON_ID, could be learner, learner manger,Learn Admin, AOR id, or any other groups that is maintained.

columns.Name: TASK_OWNER_TYPE
columns.Comments: ORA_PERSON ( most of the time it is PERSON), could be SYSTEM if you want to track Notification generation as well. Could be Areas of Responsibility, Access group.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: What learning item needs to be acted on , for example classId(class learning item id) in class preferences use case.

columns.Name: TASK_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores status of the task.

columns.Name: ACCESS_ALLOWED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which assignment task access has been given to the learner

columns.Name: COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Completion date of the task.

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: To track the source of the record creation for this table , similar to assignment records table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: To track the source of the record creation for this table , similar to assignment records table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_CODE
columns.Comments: To track the source of the record creation for this table , similar to assignment records table.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: IS_OPEN
columns.Comments: Column value represent whether activity is open for learner to start or not.

columns.Name: SECTION_LI_ID
columns.Comments: Column value represents section learning item id of the activity

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_TYPE
columns.Comments: Column value represent learning item type of activity

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: NOTES
columns.Comments: Notes by the admin for a learner activity task

columns.Name: SCORE
columns.Comments: Score acheived by  a learner activity task

columns.Name: EFFORT
columns.Comments: ACTUAL EFFORT learner has spent on a activity task

columns.Name: EFFORT_UOM
columns.Comments: Unit of measure for effort

columns.Name: TASK_SUB_STATUS
columns.Comments: Substatus of the task.

columns.Name: TRAINING_EFFORT
columns.Comments: TRAINING EFFORT learner has spent on a activity task

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason for completion

columns.Name: VILT_URL
columns.Comments: Learner vilt URL

columns.Name: VILT_CALL_TIME
columns.Comments: VILT Call time

columns.Name: VILT_CALL_STATUS
columns.Comments: VILT call status

columns.Name: VILT_CALL_LOG
columns.Comments: VILT call log

columns.Name: EXEMPTED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which exemption given for this Task or Activity

columns.Name: REQ_ACT_COMPLETION_COUNT
columns.Comments: Represent the count of activities required to complete section.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_ACTIVITY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Represents the activities that are completed for this section.

columns.Name: REQUIRED_PREDECESSOR
columns.Comments: A predecessor task that needs to be completed for learner to access current task.

columns.Name: TASK_COMPLETION_RULE
columns.Comments: Represents whether current task is required or optional to complete the section

columns.Name: TASK_POSITION
columns.Comments: Represents the activity or section position  in catalog definition

columns.Name: LI_DEF_USED_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the timestamp of the learning item change used for this assignment task creation/update

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the start date of activity attempt

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_TASK_NUMBER
columns.Comments: UserKey to uniquely identify assignment task

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_DEFINITION
columns.Comments: Represents activity definition object.

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date that the assignment will expire.

columns.Name: TASK_TYPE
columns.Comments: Represents type of task related to Example task is created for Rating activity  or Evaluation activity.

columns.Name: INCOMPLETE_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the date when assignment task entered to Incomplete status
